data_label: Demo Data — Not Actual Client Information
insights: Airport transfer was the most common service request after 8:00 PM.
Three dietary questions required human clarification because cross-contact risk was not specified.
Late check-out questions were common, but most guests did not include a preferred departure time.
Two medical-adjacent wellness questions were correctly handed to the Wellness Team.
recommendations: Add a clearer dietary cross-contact statement to the guest-facing knowledge base.
Ask for requested checkout time immediately when late check-out intent is detected.
Keep the medical/wellness handoff rule unchanged.
